heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds and smoke. Slight chance of a shower north.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds and smoke. Chance of an early shower, mainly north.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun through smoke. Chance of afternoon showers or a storm north.
temperature: Upper 70s to upper 80s, north to south

heading: Friday
temperature: Upper 60s to mid 70s north, upper 70s to mid 80s south
